task_name: priority 31「レコード」V2.0.1 v1.1 Full Rewrite C4

structure: GOALS (TRUTH FIRST + BOUNDARY RULE + IS block ban)
BOUNDARY RULE (CD→176984 STOP, Cassette→176983 STOP, etc.)
RULE 2: WORD USAGE (A=ABSOLUTE BAN, B=Source-confirmed, C=Always-use facts)
CONDITION TERMS (System 1=Vinyl Grading Goldmine, System 2=Sleeve Condition)

bootleg_4_layers.VERY_HIGH: 8 labels: Sony Music/Warner/Universal/EMI/Toshiba EMI/CBS Sony/Victor Entertainment/King Record/Nippon Columbia
bootleg_4_layers.IP_specific_HIGH: Pre-1990 MIJ City Pop + 50s-80s UK/USA first press

key_implementations.cannot_list_output: Title: [Cannot list] / Description: This item appears to be an unlicensed/pirated/bootleg vinyl record. Cannot be listed on eBay due to potential VeRO violation. / ProductName: [Cannot list] / Category: N/A
key_implementations.absolute_ban_12_terms: Bootleg / KO / Knock-off / Replica / Counterfeit / Fake / Unofficial / Unlicensed / Authentic (standalone) / Official (standalone authenticity claim) / Pirate / Unauthorized
key_implementations.title_priority_system: Required: Artist → Release Title → Format; Additional (source-confirmed only): Japan Press → With Obi → City Pop → 1st Press/Reissue → Promo/Test Pressing → Vinyl Grade
key_implementations.city_pop_prohibition: source must explicitly state シティポップ / city pop; auto-assign from artist nationality PROHIBITED
key_implementations.goldmine_prohibition: 美品→NM auto-conversion PROHIBITED; source-confirmed only
key_implementations.vinyl_grading_system: 8-grade Goldmine standard: M / NM / VG+ / VG / G+ / G / Fair / Poor

notes: Full Rewrite v1.0→v23. ABSOLUTE BAN 12-term string appears exactly 2x (BOOTLEG MUST + VERIFICATION item 14). Title priority system (not fixed 8 slots). City Pop auto-assign prohibited.
